title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Man Infraconstruction

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Man Infraconstruction
jsonLd.description:
Man Infraconstruction, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Man Infraconstruction:
Man Infraconstruction is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Man Infraconstruction!
